title: senecio leucoglossus
intro: Senecio leucoglossus, also known as White-leafed Ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a stimulant and expectorant, and to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Senecio leucoglossus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory health and alleviate cold symptoms.
